# KH Group

> KH Group — průmyslové portfolio se zaměřením na výrobu, technologie a nemovitosti.

## What this is

- **Type**: Industrial group portfolio site
- **Owner**: Kamil Hrbáček
- **Current status**: Migrated from Webflow Starter (Dec 2023 last published) to Cloudflare Pages (May 2026)
- **Language**: Czech

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://kh-group.eu/): single-page site.
